header.title: Password Generator — Create Strong & Secure Random Passwords
header.description: Free online password generator to create cryptographically secure passwords, passphrases, PINs, and memorable passwords. Customize length, character types, and exclusions. Generate strong random passwords instantly — 100% client-side with crypto.getRandomValues().
header.keywords: password generator, strong password generator, random password generator, secure password creator, passphrase generator, pin generator, memorable password generator, crypto random password

privacy.notice: 100% client-side. Passwords are generated using crypto.getRandomValues() and never sent anywhere.

bestPractices.title: Password Best Practices
bestPractices.tip1: Use a unique password for every account
bestPractices.tip2: Never share passwords via email or chat
bestPractices.tip5: A passphrase is easier to remember and just as secure

howToUse.title: How to Use
howToUse.step1Desc: Select Password, Passphrase, PIN, or Memorable depending on your needs.
howToUse.step2Desc: Adjust length, character types, word count, or separator to customize your result.
howToUse.step3Desc: Click the Generate button to create one or more passwords instantly.
howToUse.step4Desc: Click Copy or Download All to save your passwords. They never leave your device.

items.question: How long should a password be?
items.answer: At least 12–16 characters is recommended. Longer passwords dramatically increase entropy and crack time.

items.question: What is password entropy?
items.answer: Entropy measures how hard a password is to guess. It is calculated as length × log₂(charset size). Higher entropy means stronger security.

items.question: Should I use a passphrase instead?
items.answer: Yes. A 4–5 word passphrase is often stronger than a random string and much easier to remember.

items.question: Are generated passwords truly random?
items.answer: This tool uses crypto.getRandomValues(), a cryptographically secure pseudo-random number generator (CSPRNG) built into every modern browser.

items.question: Can I customize the character set?
items.answer: Yes. You can choose exactly which character types to include, exclude specific characters, or provide your own custom character set.

items.question: What's the difference between a password and a passphrase?
items.answer: A password is a random string of characters. A passphrase is a chain of random words that is easier to remember while remaining highly secure.
